title: cacalia ilicifolia
intro: Cacalia ilicifolia, also known as the American bugloss, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its edible leaves and stem. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cacalia ilicifolia include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in folk medicine and natural remedies.
